Name: Diagnostic
Description: Procedures performed to identify evaluate or monitor a medical condition.

Name: Surgical
Description: Invasive or operative procedures performed to treat or correct a condition.

Name: Laboratory
Description: Procedures involving specimen collection testing or laboratory analysis.

Name: Imaging
Description: Procedures that generate medical images for diagnosis or monitoring.

Name: Therapeutic
Description: Procedures performed to treat manage or improve a patient's condition.

Name: Nursing
Description: Routine clinical care procedures commonly performed by nursing or bedside staff.

Name: Dental
Description: Procedures related to oral health teeth and dental care.

Name: Obstetric
Description: Procedures related to pregnancy childbirth and reproductive health.

Name: Emergency
Description: Urgent or life-saving procedures performed in emergency situations.

Name: Vaccination
Description: Procedures involving the administration of vaccines or immunizations.

Name: Referral
Description: Procedures or services performed outside the current facility or by external providers.

Name: Other
Description: Procedures that do not fit into the available categories.
